results.test_name: Page loads with HTTP 200 and title
Role modal appears on Launch Console click
Enterprise Mode button navigates to login
Agent Mode button navigates to login
Page has a single H1 element
Footer or attestation network text visible
Login page accessible via direct URL
Back button on login returns to landing
Invalid route does not crash app
Landing renders correctly at Desktop FHD (1920x1080)
Landing renders correctly at Laptop HD (1280x720)
Landing renders correctly at Tablet Landscape (1024x768)
Landing renders correctly at Tablet Portrait (768x1024)
Landing renders correctly at Mobile iPhone 14 (390x844)
Landing renders correctly at Mobile Android (360x800)
Form inputs have labels or placeholders
No JavaScript console errors on load
CSS loads — body has background color
Payments page has table or list
Agent route 'Agent QR Scanner' is accessible
Agent route 'Agent Data Sync' is accessible
Agent scan page has camera UI elements
Agent sync page has sync button
Payment page loads with valid delivery ID
Payment page shows INR currency symbol
Invalid delivery ID shows graceful error
Forgot password form has email field
Assets loaded from CDN or cached
